{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"2","subject":"Part A Phase 1: Prisma schema + Diffusion planner pure functions","description":"1. Add 4 new tables to schema.prisma: RelayPool, RelayPoolMember, DiffusionOperation, DiffusionHop. Add DIFFUSION to FundOperationType enum.
2. Create packages/common/src/diffusion/types.ts with DiffusionPlanInput/Output, PlannedHop, DiffusionPlanConfig
3. Create packages/common/src/diffusion/planner.ts with DiffusionPlanner class (chain/tree/mesh strategies)
4. Create packages/common/src/diffusion/amount-splitter.ts for amount splitting with variance
5. Create packages/common/src/diffusion/index.ts barrel export
6. Create packages/common/src/diffusion/planner.spec.ts with comprehensive tests
7. Export from packages/common/src/index.ts","assignedBy":"diffusion-agent","timestamp":"2026-03-06T05:10:33.820Z"}
